data.change_summary: No additional code edits were required in this apply-fixes round. The completion-round-15 review approved the milestone task-run lineage implementation without amendments, so I left the code unchanged and carried forward the validated state from the latest reviewed build.
outstanding_risks: Milestone mutations still span separate lineage, snapshot, and journal files without a cross-file transaction, so a crash between file writes can still leave snapshot or journal state temporarily behind `task-runs.ndjson` until the same operation is replayed or state is reconciled from lineage.

Attempts that still omit `run_id` remain ambiguous for completion updates when multiple same-project runless attempts are open at once; this round preserves that audit history instead of collapsing it, but deterministic finalization still depends on richer caller metadata.

steps.description: Reviewed the approved completion-round-15 validation output and confirmed there were no follow-up fixes or amendments to apply.
Left the existing milestone task-run lineage implementation unchanged because the approved review found no remaining defects requiring code changes.
Carried forward the approved validation evidence for formatting, milestone_record tests, clippy, and bead hygiene from the latest reviewed implementation.

validation_evidence: Approved review evidence confirms `cargo fmt --all --check` passes with no formatting issues.
Approved review evidence confirms `cargo test --lib contexts::milestone_record` passes with 99 tests.
Approved review evidence confirms `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` passes cleanly.
Prior round validation evidence confirms `br lint` passed with no template warnings (`77 issues checked`).
